query:
SELECT 
  id,
  orderNo,
  customerName,
  deliveryCity,
  courseAmount,
  teacherFee,
  transportFee,
  otherFee,
  partnerFee,
  deliveryTeacher,
  deliveryCourse,
  createdAt
FROM orders 
WHERE partnerFee = '75000';
